# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

#cloud-config
package_update: true
packages:
 - httpd
write_files:
 - path: /var/www/html/index.html
   owner: www-data:www-data
   content: |
     <!doctype html>
     <html><body><h1>Welcome to Cloud Deployment Manager!</h1><p>This is a basic example of an Apache server running on Google Compute Engine using Deployment Manager. This VM has been created with the default service account and disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Security hardening will be added in phase 2.</p></body></html>
runcmd:
 - systemctl start httpd
